CVE-2020-36241.title: autoar-extractor.c in GNOME gnome-autoar through 0.2.4, as used b ...
CVE-2020-36241.summary: autoar-extractor.c in GNOME gnome-autoar through 0.2.4, as used by GNOME Shell, Nautilus, and other software, allows Directory Traversal during extraction because it lacks a check of whether a file's parent is a symlink to a directory outside of the intended extraction location.

CVE-2021-28650.title: autoar-extractor.c in GNOME gnome-autoar before 0.3.1, as used by ...
CVE-2021-28650.summary: autoar-extractor.c in GNOME gnome-autoar before 0.3.1, as used by GNOME Shell, Nautilus, and other software, allows Directory Traversal during extraction because it lacks a check of whether a file's parent is a symlink in certain complex situations. NOTE: this issue exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2020-36241.
